description: Represents the core inferred identity, skills, and connectivity status of the professional.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the professional identity record.

columns.name: user_id
columns.constraints: UNIQUE, FOREIGN KEY(auth_user.id), ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.description: Reference to the active Django auth User record.

columns.name: inferred_seniority
columns.description: AI-inferred seniority tier (e.g., Staff, Senior, Lead).

columns.name: github_connected
columns.description: Flag indicating if the user has authenticated their GitHub profile.

columns.name: linkedin_connected
columns.description: Flag indicating if the user has authenticated their LinkedIn profile.

columns.name: resume_parsed
columns.description: Flag indicating if the core resume parsing engine has successfully extracted static data.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the identity graph was established.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp indicating the last administrative or ingestion edit.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the skill mapping.

columns.name: identity_id
columns.description: Links the skill to the user's primary professional identity.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the technical or professional capability (e.g., 'React', 'Rust').

columns.name: inferred_from
columns.description: Source of enrichment signal for this capability.

columns.name: is_verified
columns.description: True if confirmed by candidate via progressive verification cards.
